description_long: This is a compact, single-engine airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent, circular propeller mounted at the nose. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, featuring slight dihedral angles and no visible winglets. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned just behind the propeller and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The landing gear is a tricycle configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The exterior is primarily white with black and yellow accents, giving it a modern and clean appearance.
description: A compact, single-propeller airplane with a mid-mounted wing, enclosed cockpit, and tricycle landing gear. The body is mostly white with black and yellow details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large circular propeller, enclosed cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing placement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, mid-mounted straight wing, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the back of the cockpit canopy.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and slight dihedral angle, no winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted propeller engine (likely piston or electric based on visible propeller).
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
